name: aircode
description: Cursor-like coding agent client powered by Claude Agent SDK

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:runtime && npm run build:server
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:shared && npm run build:runtime && npm run build:server && node --watch apps/server/dist/index.js
scripts.dev: node ./node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js -k -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run build:runtime && node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p apps/server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
